title: tanacetum corymbosum subsp. cinereum
intro: Tanacetum corymbosum subsp. cinereum, also known as cineraria, is a subspecies of the tansy plant, a perennial herb belonging to the sunflower family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which can help in treating various health issues. The health benefits of cineraria include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and soothe digestive problems, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Cineraria can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for various applications in herbal remedies and treatments.
